assumptions: No Coralogix account, team, Send-Your-Data API key, or ingested log is assumed.
A work email inbox, browser, and terminal with cURL are available.

developer_goal: Create a Coralogix account and team, obtain a Send-Your-Data API key, POST a first log via HTTPS, and see it in the product.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated POST to the region ingress /logs/v1/singles endpoint is accepted and the submitted log is visible in Coralogix (Explore, Livetail, or dashboard).
first_success.observable_signal: The submitted application/subsystem/text appear in Coralogix after a successful /singles request.

route_selection.surface: Account setup + Send-Your-Data key + REST /logs/v1/singles via cURL
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Account setup + Send-Your-Data key + REST /logs/v1/singles via cURL

candidates.name: Account setup + Send-Your-Data key + REST /logs/v1/singles via cURL
candidates.reason: Common questions say a one-off test can post directly to the logs API. The REST /singles guide documents cURL with a Send-Your-Data Bearer key and ends at viewing logs in the Coralogix dashboard. Integration packages are an alternate guided path.

candidates.name: Integration packages
candidates.reason: Guided alternate; cURL /singles is the documented one-off API test.

required_path.action: Sign up with a work email, activate from the verification message, create the organization, and create the first team.
required_path.observable_result: The team URL and console are available.

required_path.action: Open Data Flow → API Keys (or Settings → Users and Teams → API Keys), create a Send-Your-Data key, and copy it immediately.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is stored locally.

required_path.action: Map the team login hostname to the matching Coralogix domain and form `https://ingress.<domain>/logs/v1/singles`.
required_path.observable_result: The domain matches a Quick reference row.

required_path.action: POST a JSON array to `/logs/v1/singles` with Content-Type: application/json and Authorization: Bearer <Send-Your-Data API key>.
Confirm the submitted log in Livetail or Explore (filter by application name if needed).
required_path.observable_result: The event text and metadata match the POST body.

prerequisites.description: A Coralogix organization and team created with a work email.
The ingress hostname must match the team's Coralogix domain/region.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTPS client). No SDK is required.

sources.title: API keys
evidence_supported: One-time key disclosure when security is enabled

uncertainties.question: Will a given work-email domain create a new organization or join an existing one?
uncertainties.impact: Path may include Org Admin approval instead of self-service team creation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Account-state dependent; not fully enumerated in public docs.
